nasb.text: Then Jeroboam’s wife arose and departed and came to Tirzah. As she was entering the threshold of the house, the child died.

esv.text: Then Jeroboam’s wife arose and departed and came to Tirzah. And as she came to the threshold of the house, the child died.

cnv.text: 耶羅波安的妻子動身離去，回到得撒；她一踏進門檻，孩子就死了。

ccb.text: 耶罗波安的妻子动身回到得撒，刚迈过家门槛，孩子就死了。
